message:
feat(policy): add PolicySurface annotations and improve MCP/workflow input parsing

main.rs:
- Add .with_surface(PolicySurface::Mux) and .with_surface(PolicySurface::Workflow)
  to all PolicyInput construction sites, ensuring the policy engine can
  differentiate between mux-originated and workflow-originated actions
- Add surface assertion tests verifying correct annotation

mcp_tools.rs:
- Extract accounts_refresh_policy_input() helper with PolicySurface::Mcp
  annotation, replacing inline PolicyInput construction
- Add test verifying the helper produces correct surface/action/actor

workflows/handlers.rs:
- Extract parse_i64_field() and parse_cost_usd_field() helpers that
  accept both string and numeric JSON values, replacing duplicated
  .as_str().and_then(parse_number) chains
- parse_cost_usd_field handles comma-separated numbers and whitespace
- Consolidates token and cost field parsing for Codex session summaries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
